name: geoseal-compile
description: Compile natural-language intent into a GeoSeal command plan (scbe_command_plan_v1)

name: geoseal-exec
description: Execute a pre-compiled command through the GeoSeal governance gate (max-tier ALLOW)

name: geoseal-seal
description: Seal a payload with a governance tier stamp

name: geoseal-explain-route
description: Explain the Sacred Tongue routing for a task or source file

name: geoseal-encode
description: Encode payload through Sacred Tongues transport

name: geoseal-verify
description: Verify a sealed GeoSeal payload

name: scbe-agentbus
description: Route task through the full SCBE Python agentbus (braid + dispatch)

name: scbe-antivirus
description: Run SCBE lightweight static safety scan on the current workspace

name: scbe-governance-fuse
description: Fuse AV/EDR/SIEM/runtime alerts into a single SCBE governance decision

name: scbe-runtime
description: Execute a task through the governed polyglot runtime

name: scbe-flow
description: Run doctrine-backed multi-agent flow planner for a task

name: scbe-tongues
description: Six-Tongues toolkit passthrough

name: scbe-cli-shell-bench
description: Run the SCBE CLI agent-json protocol benchmark (mock/model-independent harness checks)

name: scbe-cli-task-corpus
description: Run the SCBE CLI real task corpus with verifier-gated completion

name: scbe-cli-harness-matrix
description: Run SCBE CLI harness control matrix: protocol, offline scaffold corpus, and missing-model negative control

name: video-pocket-director
description: Run the SCBE video lattice pocket-dimension director demo through the local deterministic round-table harness

name: research-arxiv
description: Search arXiv preprints for papers matching a query. Free, no auth required. Returns titles, authors, abstract summaries, and URLs.

name: research-semantic-scholar
description: Search Semantic Scholar for academic papers with citation counts. Free, no auth required. Good for finding highly-cited work.

name: research-openalex
description: Search OpenAlex scholarly works index. Free, no auth required. Covers 250M+ works with open-access flag and citation counts.

name: research-crossref
description: Search CrossRef for DOI-registered publications. Free, no auth required. Best for finding official citations and publisher metadata.

name: research-pubmed
description: Search PubMed biomedical literature via NCBI E-utilities. Free, no auth required. Best for medical, biology, and life-sciences queries.

name: research-sam-gov
description: Search SAM.gov active federal contract and grant opportunities. Requires SAM_GOV_API_KEY env var. Returns NAICS, set-aside, close dates.

name: research-uspto
description: Search USPTO patent applications via the Open Data Portal File Wrapper API. Requires USPTO_ODP_API_KEY env var. Returns application numbers, status, inventors.

name: research-hf-models
description: Search HuggingFace model hub for models matching a query. Free; HF_TOKEN optional for higher rate limits. Returns model IDs, downloads, pipeline tags.

name: research-github-repos
description: Search GitHub public repositories by stars and relevance. GITHUB_TOKEN recommended for quota. Returns names, descriptions, stars, languages.

name: geoseal-cross-build
description: Cross-build a rendered Tier 1 lexicon template from one Sacred Tongue to another. Input must be a rendered template string, e.g. "(x + y)" (KO/python add). Returns src/dst code, language names, and the lattice IR. Run geoseal-cross-build with --list-ops to see all 64 ops and their templates per tongue.

name: geoseal-cross-build-broadcast
description: Broadcast a rendered Tier 1 lexicon template from one Sacred Tongue into ALL other five tongues simultaneously. Returns a translation map: {KO,AV,RU,CA,UM,DR}→rendered_code. Input format: same as geoseal-cross-build.

name: scbe-compass
description: SCBE Compass governed route planner — classify a task and emit a native ScbeCompassRoutePlan with formation, command path, board rules, adapter slots, and governance constraints (local_only, budget_cents=0 by default).

name: scbe-hermes
description: Hermes compatibility alias over SCBE Compass — same planning logic, emits HermesRoutePlan schema (hermes_route_plan.v1) for backward-compatible bus integrations.

name: roll-stack-maze-benchmark
description: Run the SCBE Compass roll-stack execution benchmark on deterministic maze pathfinding fixtures. Requires a real local BFS execution, output-contract validation, and receipt hashes; plan-only results fail the lane.

name: worm-environment-adapter-benchmark
description: Run a local-sensing worm/pathfinding benchmark with touch, chemo-gradient, frontier, edge-channel, and memory sensors. Scores depth of penetration, loop rate, greedy-baseline delta, and receipt hashes instead of only solved/failed.

name: projection-board-pathfinding-benchmark
description: Run a fog-of-war projection-board benchmark where visible x,y movement is projected from hidden goal, frontier, permission, security, importance-depth, memory, spin-coherence, and 3x3 kernel-convolution lattice fields.

name: pathfinding-suite-benchmark
description: Run every current agent-bus pathfinding benchmark: roll-stack maze, worm environmental adapter, projection-board hidden-lattice navigation, and vector-field navigation. Emits one combined evidence scorecard.

name: vector-field-nav-benchmark
description: Run seeded multi-lattice, depth-first, and ensemble-beam vector-field navigation against A*, greedy, and random baselines with receipt-chain scoring, ablations, security tiers, importance depth, 3x3 kernel convolution, fluidic heat maps, and pressure sensing.

name: vector-field-random-solve-sweep
description: Run deterministic randomized maze solves using the random baseline and report solve rate, receipt chains, fluidic heat peaks, and pressure averages.

name: semantic-hex-bridge
description: Encode text through the agent-bus 6D semantic bridge into binary and 12-character hex routing evidence.

name: tokenizer-atomic-selfcheck
description: Run Sacred Tongue byte-bijection self-check as the current atomic-tokenizer transport smoke test.

name: ai-router-health
description: Check all configured model provider health (cerebras, groq, huggingface, openai, xai, anthropic). Free/local lanes are distinguished from quota-limited remote free tiers. No secrets are exposed in output.

name: ai-router-call
description: Route a prompt through the squad cheap-first terminal AI router. Tries cerebras (~920ms free tier) first, then groq, then huggingface. Provider caps and daily budget limits are enforced. Requires at least one of: CEREBRAS_API_KEY, GROQ_API_KEY, HF_TOKEN.

name: youtube-video-review
description: Review uploaded YouTube videos and emit score reports for titles, descriptions, transcripts, and tags.

name: youtube-article-dry-run
description: Dry-run article-to-video generation for a provided article path before rendering or upload.

name: youtube-upload-unlisted
description: Upload a rendered video to YouTube as unlisted. Public publishing still requires explicit human approval.

name: writing-roundtable-review
description: Run the existing longform round-table review pipeline for writing/manuscript quality checks.

name: agentic-pazaak-board
description: Run the deterministic Pazaak-style bitboard planner for bounded agentic task routing moves.

name: coding-board-trial
description: Run the non-destructive coding-board legality probe through GeoSeal legitimacy before execution.

name: chessboard-dev-stack
description: Generate Spec Kit/BMAD/GSD/Superpowers chessboard packets for an agentic development goal.

name: scbe-tool-register
description: Register a new agent-bus tool from a validated JSON ToolSpec. Writes tools.json atomically after command-target verification. Input is the JSON spec.

name: binary-hex-compiler
description: Compile text into lossless UTF-8 byte hex/binary plus SCBE semantic hex routing evidence.

name: auto-abridge
description: Deterministically abridge long text into a compact bounded packet with omitted-character accounting.

name: scbe-clock-ticker
description: Emit compact ISS/UTC time, local time, system time, and an optional task ticker. ISS time is UTC/GMT.

name: tool-validate
description: Validate a tool spec JSON without registering it. Input is a JSON object with the proposed spec (name, description, command, args, optional patentSurface). Returns ok=true/false with a list of schema errors. Use as a dry-run before calling scbe-tool-register.

name: tool-list
description: List all registered agent-bus tools. Input is an optional name filter substring (pass empty string to list all, or a partial name to filter). Returns tools_count and a per-tool summary: name, command, patentSurface, description_head.

name: star-path-bench
description: Benchmark the tool graph as a star-navigation mission planner (BFS, Dijkstra, A*). Returns galaxy map, hub tools, delta-V stats, and six canonical mission trajectories.

name: life-ledger-encounter
description: Record an encounter in an agent life ledger. Detects known vs new persons, tracks alignment and interaction history. Provide {task} as --ledger <path> --agent-id <id> [--alignment <float>].

name: rubix-browser-plan
description: Plan a browser-control route as permission-defined Rubix/tesseract faces with blocked-move audit evidence

name: rubix-browser-bench
description: Run the headless Rubix browser permission-geometry benchmark for CI-safe browser-control preflight
